subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, Thou through Whose Name the ocean of divine knowledge hath surged within creation, and the nightingale of proof hath warbled upon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا من باسمک ماج بحر العرفان فی الامکان و غرد عندلیب البرهان علی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
